title: On My Radar
subtitle: Monitored pages
description: Tracks changes on any web pages you care about — lab sites, supervisor pages, deadlines.
descriptionZh: 监控任意网页的变化——导师主页、实验室公告、截止日期等。

setupFields.label: Pages to monitor
setupFields.hint: Add one URL per line. Changes since the last run will be summarised.
setupFields.hintZh: 每行一个 URL。自上次运行以来的变化将被自动摘要。
